untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put-call ratio data which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The put-call ratio (put volume / call volume) is an options market metric not present in price/technical indicator set. Used vol_ratio_20 as a proxy for elevated volume relative to normal, combined with RSI < 30 to detect excessive bearishness, but this is not a true put-call ratio implementation.
translation_notes: Attempted translation using vol_ratio_20 (volume ratio) as a proxy for relative bearish volume and rsi_14 < 30 to detect oversold/excessive bearish sentiment. Exit uses RSI mean reversion (>50). However, this is fundamentally incomplete without actual options volume data (put volume vs call volume). The original signal is contrarian-based requiring derivatives market data unavailable in the backtest engine.
